identity.name: Orcabet (Fantasy Orcasitas)
identity.target_audience: Young adults (18-30), Gamers, Sports Fans, Orcasitas Locals

usage.h1: text-4xl md:text-6xl font-black tracking-tighter uppercase font-heading
usage.body: text-base md:text-lg font-light tracking-wide text-gray-300 font-body
usage.label: text-xs font-bold tracking-[0.2em] uppercase text-gray-500 font-mono

buttons.primary: bg-primary text-black font-black uppercase tracking-widest px-8 py-3 clip-path-polygon hover:bg-primary/80 transition-all duration-300 shadow-[0_0_20px_rgba(255,107,0,0.4)]
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border border-primary/50 text-primary font-bold uppercase tracking-widest px-8 py-3 hover:bg-primary/10 transition-all duration-300

cards.base: bg-[#0A0A0F]/90 backdrop-blur-md border border-white/5 rounded-xl overflow-hidden hover:border-primary/50 transition-colors duration-300 relative group
cards.feature: bg-gradient-to-br from-[#0A0A0F] to-[#050505] border border-white/5 p-8 rounded-2xl hover:shadow-[0_0_30px_rgba(255,107,0,0.15)] transition-shadow duration-500

inputs.default: bg-black/50 border border-white/10 rounded-lg px-4 py-3 text-white focus:border-primary focus:ring-1 focus:ring-primary outline-none transition-all duration-300 placeholder:text-gray-600

betting_slip.container: fixed bottom-0 right-0 w-full md:w-96 bg-[#111] border-t-2 border-primary transform transition-transform duration-300 z-50
betting_slip.header: bg-primary text-black font-bold p-4 flex justify-between items-center cursor-pointer

borders.cyber: border border-primary/30 relative after:content-[''] after:absolute after:top-0 after:left-0 after:w-2 after:h-2 after:bg-primary after:shadow-[0_0_10px_#FF6B00]

instructions_to_main_agent: INSTALL FONTS: Add 'Orbitron' and 'Exo 2' from Google Fonts to index.html or index.css immediately.
THEME ENFORCEMENT: Force Dark Mode. There is no light mode. The 'light' class in Tailwind should NOT be used or should mirror dark values.
COMPONENTS: Use Shadcn UI but STRIP all 'default' white/slate styling. Override with black/gray-900/neon-orange.
NAVIGATION: Create a floating bottom nav for mobile and a sidebar/topbar for desktop.
TEAM GENERATOR: Use HTML5 Canvas to compose the athlete image + stats + cyberpunk border overlaid on top.
ROULETTE: Implement a CSS/JS spinning wheel animation. Do not use a static image for the interaction.
BETTING SLIP: Needs to be always accessible (sticky) when bets are active.
CARD OPENING: This is the 'Wow' moment. Use Framer Motion for a 3D flip effect + particle explosion (tsparticles) when a high rarity is pulled.
ADMIN: Can be simpler/cleaner (Table-heavy), but keep the dark theme.
USER FEEDBACK: Use 'sonner' for toast notifications with neon borders.
universal_guidelines: Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur).
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable.
